info.title: Samrat Enterprise HMS API
info.description:
Comprehensive Swagger / OpenAPI documentation covering all modules, submodules, and endpoints.

Authentication: JWT Bearer tokens (Authorization: Bearer <token>).

All endpoints follow a standard response format using BaseResponse.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

error.description: Error code if success is false

post.description: Registers a new user account in the system
Adds a new department to the hospital branch. Only `name` is required; `code` is auto-generated if omitted.

get.description: Retrieves all departments available in the current hospital branch with pagination
Retrieves a simple list of all departments
Retrieves a simple list of all departments
Retrieves all active departments
Retrieves a department by ID
Retrieves a department by its unique code
Retrieves a paginated list of all appointments

post.description: Schedules a new appointment for a patient with a specific doctor and department. Allowed visitType values: OPD, IPD, EMERGENCY

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific appointment

put.description: Retrieves details of a specific appointment

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all invoices
Retrieves a paginated list of clinical records with optional filters for room, status, doctor, and date

post.description: Creates a clinical record.\n\n

get.description: Filters EMR records by patient, doctor, department, and keywords

get.summary: Get E M R By Id

get.description: Adds a nursing care note for an admitted patient

post.description: Creates a discharge summary and updates admission status
Records a new set of vitals for a patient. Can be called multiple times per visit.

get.description: Aggregates appointments, surgeries, and clinical data for a doctor
Aggregates appointments, surgeries, and clinical data for a doctor

post.description: Creates a new doctor profile

get.description: Creates a new doctor profile
Retrieves a doctor's details by ID

put.description: Retrieves a doctor's details by ID

get.description: Updates an existing doctor profile
Retrieves a list of doctors currently available for consultations
Finds doctors based on their medical specialization
Retrieves all doctors belonging to a specific department

post.description: Records a new debit or credit transaction in the system
Registers new stock items in the hospital pharmacy

get.description: Registers new stock items in the hospital pharmacy
Filters pharmacy stock by name, generic name, and batch number

put.description: Updates an existing stock item's details

delete.description: Updates an existing stock item's details

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all IPD admissions
Admits a patient to a specific bed under a doctor's care

post.description: Discharges a patient from the hospital and releases the bed
Discharges a patient from the hospital and releases the bed

get.description: Retrieves a list of nurses currently available
Retrieves a list of nurses currently available
Finds nurses based on their department

post.description: Checks in a patient for their scheduled OPD appointment
Checks in a patient for their scheduled OPD appointment

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all OPD visits
Filters OPD visits by patient, doctor, department, status, and date range
Retrieves details of a specific OPD visit

post.description: Retrieves details of a specific OPD visit
Registers a new patient and records their initial visit details
Creates a new patient profile in the system

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all patients
Retrieves a patient's details using their internal database ID

put.description: Retrieves a patient's details using their internal database ID

get.description: Updates an existing patient profile
Finds patients based on their phone number
Retrieves a patient's details using their unique hospital ID
Retrieves a list of family members for a specific patient

post.description: Records a new visitor entering the hospital

put.description: Records a new visitor entering the hospital

post.description: Generates a new performance or clinical report in PDF/Excel format
Registers a new hospital employee in the system
Generates a meeting link and starts the consultation
